reviews.comment:
La atención de quienes cargan el combustible genial. Pero cómo puede un punto tan importante en la provincia cerrar tan temprano?

(Translated by Google)
The attention of those who fill up the gas station is great. But how can such an important station in the province close so early?
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXeWI2WDB3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Lástima x la reducción del cupo de combustible ya q desde las 4 de la madrugada estuve frente a la estación esperando gas oil y un playero no cumplió con su palabra de q había gas oil cuando me puse en la fila para cargar el mismo me dijo q no había combustible y negó haber dicho q si iba a haber muchas horas perdidas para el q viene en viaje para después topar con un mentiroso

(Translated by Google)
It's a shame about the reduction in the fuel quota, since I was in front of the station waiting for diesel since 4 in the morning and a beach attendant didn't keep his word that there was diesel. When I got in line to fill up, he told me there was no fuel and denied having said that there would be many hours lost for those coming on the trip, only to later run into a liar.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXOFk3TFlREAE

reviews.comment:
Un lugar muy acogedor.  La atención personalizada y da muchísimo gusto pasar por el lugar. Felicitaciones a su dueña por tanta amabilidad

(Translated by Google)
A very welcoming place. The service is personalized, and it's a pleasure to stop by. Congratulations to the owner for her kindness.
